title: Inspect /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto for every production path that reads, writes, validates, or publishes reply URLs. Focus on whether the new Notion field `Reply URLs` reaches scheduler/manual publish/queue audit without gaps. Return only concrete missing paths or say none. Do not edit files.
summary_text: - 3376b8c0-f0ac-812b-8ac8-d6b24cc7d4c2 — 2nd paragraph is the weak point (`563` chars, 3 lines >120 chars); add LF after each long sentence cluster in para2: `...医療のように...` → `...個人の工夫が...` and `...この構築が個人の裏技...` and `...だからこそ、シャドウAI...` to reduce two visually flat blocks. - 3376b8c0-f0ac-8159-8993-ecfa84e086e6 — para2 is overlong (`548` chars, 3 long lines) and reads as a flat block; insert breaks after `...実務的だ。`, after `...十分に見えない。` and before final short close `データの信頼性を語れない...`. - 3376b8c0-f0ac-81f0-bce5-c8ec11bb4f7d — para2 is too dense (`500` chars) and para1 has compressed rhythm; split para2 into one sentence-per-line chunks at these boundaries: `...組織は守れない。`, `...はずだ。`, `...難しいからだ。`, and before final closing sentence. - 3376b8c0-f0ac-8100-af94-d7464363d552 — para2 is `453` chars and paragraph rhythm drops after the intro quote section; add breaks before `だから一次資料...`, `要約AIは役に立つ。`, and `しかも一次資料の確認は...` so the 2nd paragraph becomes 3–4 stacked thought units. - 3386b8c0-f0ac-81f9-b3d3-f2d95b0dbd77 — remaining flatness in long para2/3/4 (`223`, `188`, `227` chars) despite existing breaks; split each into sentence-based lines, especially after `...小さなコピーに置き換えられやすい。`, `...ここに責任と文脈が残るからだ。`, and `...どこで止めるかを決める必要がある。`. - 3366b8c0-f0ac-81b0-ad28-d913b7243783 — while not 2-paragraph, it has many lines at/near visual-flat length (`max line=155`, `6` lines >=120); apply line breaks inside long explanatory sentences in para1/para2 at clause boundaries (e.g., after each sentence containing one policy/causal claim) to avoid horizontal monotony.
